title: ExamRegistration
description: A candidate's registration/application for a DCAS civil-service examination — the everyday citizen transaction. NET-NEW: DCAS publishes the exam SCHEDULE openly (4ptz-hmtc) but there is NO public API to actually apply. Today candidates register only inside the Online Application System (OASys) on the aNNN application layer (a127-jobs.nyc.gov, now the City Jobs portal cityjobs.nyc.gov) and pay a fee. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get a candidate's own registrations) and the ExamRegistrationRequest write surface (register for an exam).

registrationId.description: Server-assigned registration / confirmation number (OASys). Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by DCAS, not the candidate.

examNumber.description: The examination number being applied for ('Examination Number').

currentCityEmployee.description: Whether the applicant is a current city employee (affects promotion eligibility).

residencyCreditClaimed.description: Applicant is claiming NYC residency credit.

feeWaiverRequested.description: Applicant is requesting an application-fee waiver (e.g. public-assistance recipients).
